en.title: real estate agent
en.prompt: I want you to act as a real estate agent. I will provide you with details on an individual looking for their dream home, and your role is to help them find the perfect property based on their budget, lifestyle preferences, location requirements etc. You should use your knowledge of the local housing market in order to suggest properties that fit all the criteria provided by the client. My first request is [dream home details]
en.remark: Search for properties that meet the requirements in a designated area.

metaDescription: Buying a home? Find properties matching budget and lifestyle. Get expert suggestions based on local market knowledge. Try it now.

faq.q: Can the AI find real real estate listings?
faq.a: No. The AI isn't online, and all "recommended listings" are fabricated, addresses / prices / square footage all unreliable. It suits organizing your home-buying checklist and negotiation talking points. For real listings use Lianjia, Beike, or 58 on actual platforms.

faq.q: Can I trust its property investment advice?
faq.a: Regional trend judgments may be 1-2 years out of date, and it doesn't know recent purchase restriction policies or school district changes. Treat it as a macro perspective. Actual purchase decisions need current policy, real price data (Anjuke historical prices), and your family's financials.
